item.description: Learn how to write verification environments, add and run tests, measure coverage, and review existing verification documentation

item.title: Multi-language Conversion Tool — Picker
item.description: Convert hardware circuits to software language packages with just one command

item.title: Chip Verification Agent — UCAgent
item.description: AI-driven chip verification, bringing unit-level hardware verification into a new intelligent stage

item.description: Challenge RISC-V vector operator verification

item.title: UnityChip Hackathon Season 1: Warm-up Challenge (Completed)
item.description: Use UCAgent to participate in the hackathon and win prizes through practical combat

item.title: UT Practice Session 10: AI Vector Processor — Floating-Point Fused Add Module Verification (Completed)
item.description: Take on the RISC-V Vector Extension practice challenge and verify an AI chip module firsthand

item.title: UT Practice Session 9: Third-Generation XiangShan (Kunming Lake) Architecture LSU-StoreUnit Module UT Verification Practice (Completed)
item.description: Learn XiangShan LSU-StoreUnit microarchitecture design through verification

item.description: Learn the microarchitecture design of XiangShan’s L2TLB-bitmap through verification

item.description: Learning Xiangshan ICache Microarchitecture Design Through Verification

item.title: UT Practice Session 7: UT Verification of the LSQ Module in the 3rd Generation XiangShan (Kunming Lake) Architecture (Completed)
item.description: Learn the microarchitecture design of XiangShan LSQ through verification

item.description: Learn the Microarchitecture Design of Xiangshan’s ITLB Through Verification

item.title: ChiselVerify
item.description: ChiselVerify: A Hardware Verification Library for Chisel

item.title: Fault
item.description: fault: A Python Embedded Domain-Specific Language for Metaprogramming Portable Hardware Verification Components

item.title: Basic Verification Documents
item.description: Learn How to Perform Chip Verification Based on Picker

item.title: Breaking News | Wanzhong Yixin Paper Accepted by ISCA 2026: Redefining Hardware Verification with a "Software-Native" Approach
item.description: Recently, the research achievement of the Wanzhong Yixin team, ‘Democratizing and Accelerating Hardware Verification with Software-Native Optimization,’ has been officially accepted by ISCA 2026. This is a landmark work in the field of hardware verification methodology.

item.title: [Technical Interpretation] Open Source Tool Picker—Say Goodbye to Manual DPI, Use Picker Pack to Achieve Python-Driven UVM Automated Verification
item.description: The open-source tool Picker launched by the “Thousands of Chips in Unity” open verification platform has successfully achieved efficient cross-language verification. Developers can use a single command to complete the conversion from RTL-level code to multi-language software packages.

item.title: First "Thousands of Chips in Unity" Hackathon Successfully Concluded! UCAgent Chip Verification AI Agent Successfully Completed Practical Testing
item.description: After 48 hours of intensive technical sprint, the first “Thousands of Chips in Unity” Open Source Chip Hackathon successfully concluded on December 7th.

item.title: Learning Task 1: Picker Part
item.description: Get familiar with the basic usage of Picker

item.title: Learning Task 2: Toffee Part
item.description: Building a verification environment with Toffee

item.title: Learning Task 3: Verify NutShell Cache
item.description: Combine your learned knowledge to complete verification of NutShell Cache

item.description: Verification object for beginner tasks

item.description: Enabling every developer to participate in RISC-V processor verification
